testes-gerais.subtitulo: Automated tracking and correction of vitest and playwright tests
testes-gerais.card_aprovados_tooltip: Number of test suites (unit, integration and e2e) that completed all assertions without failures or bottlenecks and passed the CI pipeline.
testes-gerais.card_reprovados_tooltip: Set of tests that did not meet the defined assertion premises, returning validation error codes or timeouts during execution.
testes-gerais.card_erro_tooltip: Tests flagged with complete crash (OOM, system panic or syntax parser error) whose process froze unexpectedly in the runner.
testes-gerais.tooltip_agendamento: Manage and configure automatic test execution schedules
testes-gerais.tooltip_rodar: Manually trigger the execution of the entire test suite across all modules
testes-gerais.tooltip_data_desc: Date when the test battery was triggered by the runner.
testes-gerais.tooltip_hora_desc: Exact time the execution of this test suite started.
testes-gerais.tooltip_tipo_desc: Defines if the test is Unit, E2E (End-to-End) or Functional.
testes-gerais.tooltip_modulo_desc: Identifies which microservice or system area is being validated.
testes-gerais.tooltip_teste_desc: Description of the specific functionality or user flow tested.
testes-gerais.tooltip_resultado_desc: Indicates if all test assertions passed (PASSED) or if there was a failure (FAILED).
testes-gerais.tooltip_duracao_desc: Total processing duration of the test, including setup and teardown.
testes-gerais.expandido_sucesso: Test passed successfully. No action required.
testes-gerais.tooltip_busca: Search test by name, module or type
testes-gerais.tooltip_expandir: View technical AI analysis and detailed reasons for failures or successes

cargowise.subtitulo: Native integration via eAdaptor XML — guided onboarding in 3 steps
cargowise.banner_uat: You are in UAT mode. No real operations will be affected.
cargowise.banner_producao: You are in Production mode. Actions will have real effects in CargoWise.
cargowise.eadaptor_desc: eAdaptor is the official CargoWise One bus for XML data exchange. Gravity uses it to send DI/DUE declarations, shipping documents and process data in a standardized and traceable way. The XML below is automatically generated from your process.
cargowise.alerta_bl_desc: The Bill of Lading has not yet been received. The eAdaptor will be paused at this field until the PDF is uploaded. Advance to the next step to send the file.
cargowise.hero_desc: The eAdaptor is ready but the Document[BL] field is paused waiting for the bill of lading PDF. Upload below to release synchronization with CargoWise.
cargowise.upload_arrastar: Drag the BL here or click to choose
cargowise.doc_invoice: Invoice & Packing List (PDF generated by Gravity)
cargowise.success_desc: The documentation package has been received by the Gravity team. CargoWise connector onboarding is being finalized. You will receive a confirmation email with the staging result within 24 business hours.

item.ncm_tooltip: Mercosur Common Nomenclature — product fiscal classification
item.pais_origem_tooltip: Country where the product was manufactured
item.unidade_medida_tooltip: Unit used to measure the item quantity
item.preco_unitario_tooltip: Unit value of the item in the order currency
item.valor_total_tooltip: Calculated total: Unit Price × Quantity A
item.ncm_ex_tooltip: NCM extension for products with special treatment
item.tec_tooltip: Common External Tariff applied to the item
item.situacao_tooltip: Current item status in the order
item.campo_especial_desc: Configurable field for internal use or specific integrations
item.desc_completa_en_desc: Product description in English, as per international invoice
item.texto_ncm_desc: Official description of the NCM tariff position according to TEC
item.atributos_catalogo_desc: Technical product attributes according to catalog (color, voltage, etc.)
item.anexo_lpco_desc: License, Permit, Certificate or Other (LPCO) File
item.data_transferencia_desc: Date on which the item was transferred to a logistics process
item.data_consolidacao_desc: Date on which the item was consolidated into a process
item.saldo_desc: Initial quantity minus canceled and transferred
item.qtd_pronta_desc: Amount produced by the factory and validated for shipment
item.qtd_transferida: Transferred Quantity of Item in Order
item.qtd_transferida_desc: Quantity of this item already transferred to other orders.
item.qtd_transferida_bloqueado: Calculated field — automatically incremented when performing a transfer. Cannot be edited directly.
item.qtd_cancelada: Canceled Quantity of Item in Order
item.qtd_cancelada_desc: Total permanently canceled — subtracts from the initial balance
item.seq_item_desc: Sequential number of the item within the order (as per invoice)
item.desc_completa_pt_desc: Detailed technical description of the product as per catalog
item.desc_completa_nf_desc: Product description as it will be displayed on the incoming fiscal invoice
item.qtd_estatistica_desc: Quantity of the item expressed in the statistical unit required by DUIMP
item.peso_liq_unitario_desc: Unit net weight of the product, in kg
item.peso_bruto_unitario_desc: Unit gross weight including packaging, in kg
item.cubagem_unitaria_desc: Unit volume of the product, in m³
item.tipo_embalagem_desc: Type of product packaging (e.g., Box, Pallet, Drum)
item.numero_lpco_desc: License, Permit, Certificate, or Other documents required for import
item.numero_cert_origem_desc: Number of the certificate of origin issued by the exporter or chamber of commerce
item.data_cert_origem_desc: Issuance date of the certificate of origin
item.grupo_item_desc: Product classification group as per registration
item.subgrupo_item_desc: Product classification subgroup within the main group

barra.api_desc: Integrate via REST API using Cockpit
barra.smart_read_desc_pedido: AI extracts data from the document
barra.smart_read_desc_item: AI extracts items from the document
barra.transferir_desc: Transfers the balance of selected orders to a logistics process
barra.consolidar_desc: Groups the selected orders into a single logistics process
barra.consolidar_min: Select at least 2 orders to consolidate
barra.msg_mixed_tipos: Select only import orders or only export orders to perform this action.
barra.editar_massa_desc: Edits common fields in the selected orders
barra.gerar_documento_desc: Generates PDF from a template or standard document
barra.duplicar_desc: Creates copies of the selected orders

coluna_pai.numero_pedido_desc: Order number (parent row) or Item No. (child row)
coluna_pai.nome_exportador_desc: Foreign supplier/exporter in the import operation
coluna_pai.nome_importador_desc: Foreign buyer/importer in the export operation
coluna_pai.referencia_importador_desc: Importer's internal reference code for the order
coluna_pai.referencia_exportador_desc: Reference code used by the exporter
coluna_pai.descricao_item_desc: Product description — visible only in expanded items
coluna_pai.numero_proforma_desc: Reference of the linked Proforma Invoice
coluna_pai.incoterm_desc: Delivery rule: FOB, CIF, EXW, etc.
coluna_pai.valor_unitario_item_desc: Unit value of the item — visible only in expanded items.
coluna_pai.quantidade_transferida_total_desc: Sum of the transferred quantity of all order items.
coluna_pai.quantidade_cancelada_total_pedido_desc: Total permanently canceled in order items.
coluna_pai.data_emissao_pedido_desc: Registration or issuance date of the Purchase Order
coluna_pai.status_desc: Lifecycle: Draft, Open, In Transfer, Consolidated, Canceled
coluna_pai.referencia_fabricante_desc: Reference code used by the manufacturer
coluna_pai.condicao_pagamento_pedido_desc: Payment terms and method agreed with the exporter.
coluna_pai.data_prevista_pedido_pronto_desc: Estimated date for the order to be ready for shipment
coluna_pai.data_confirmada_pedido_pronto_desc: Confirmed date for the order to be ready
coluna_pai.data_meta_pedido_pronto_desc: Target date defined by the importer
coluna_pai.data_meta_inspecao_pedido_desc: Target date for the order inspection
coluna_pai.data_meta_coleta_pedido_desc: Target date for the order pickup
coluna_pai.data_consolidacao_pedido_desc: Date when the order was consolidated
coluna_pai.data_transferencia_saldo_pedido_desc: Date when the balance was transferred
coluna_pai.pais_exportador_desc: Country of origin of the exporter/supplier
coluna_pai.exportador_ou_fabricante_desc: Indicates if the exporter is also the manufacturer
coluna_pai.relacao_exportador_fabricante_desc: Type of relationship between exporter and manufacturer
coluna_pai.nome_contato_exportador_desc: Name of the main contact at the exporter
coluna_pai.cargo_contato_exportador_desc: Position or role of the contact at the exporter
coluna_pai.pais_fabricante_desc: Country where the product was manufactured
coluna_pai.anexo_pedido_desc: Order file in PDF or other format
coluna_pai.quantidade_volumes_pedido_desc: Total number of volumes (boxes, pallets, etc.)
coluna_pai.cnpj_raiz_empresa_responsavel_titulo: Root CNPJ of the Responsible Company
coluna_pai.cnpj_raiz_empresa_responsavel_desc: Root CNPJ (first 8 digits) of the Brazilian company responsible for the Foreign Operator
coluna_pai.codigo_ope_desc: Foreign Operator (OPE) identification code in Siscomex
coluna_pai.situacao_ope_desc: OPE registration status in Siscomex: Active, Suspended, Deactivated
coluna_pai.versao_ope_desc: Current version of the Foreign Operator registration
coluna_pai.nome_ope_desc: Legal name of the Foreign Operator registered in Siscomex
coluna_pai.pais_ope_desc: Country where the Foreign Operator is based
coluna_pai.estado_ope_desc: State or province of the Foreign Operator
coluna_pai.endereco_ope_desc: Full address of the Foreign Operator
coluna_pai.zip_code_ope_desc: Postal code of the Foreign Operator
coluna_pai.tin_ope_desc: Tax Identification Number — fiscal identifier of the OPE in its country of origin

Estimated date for receipt of the draft Order
coluna_pai.data_confirmada_recebimento_rascunho_ped: Confirmed Date — Receipt of Draft Order

coluna_pai.data_meta_recebimento_rascunho_pedido_de: Target date for receipt of the draft Order

status.descricao: Drag to reorder · edit name and color · system statuses cannot be deleted

notificacoes.descricao: Choose which events generate alerts for you
notificacoes.pedido_atrasado_desc: Alert when an order exceeds the estimated date
notificacoes.novo_pedido_desc: Notification when creating or receiving a new order
notificacoes.item_transferido_desc: When an item's quantity is transferred to another order
notificacoes.pedido_excluido_desc: Confirmation when an order is removed
notificacoes.importacao_concluida_desc: Notice when batch import is finished

exportacao.incluir_colunas_desc: Adds custom columns created by you
exportacao.incluir_itens_desc: Also exports item rows for each order
exportacao.apenas_selecionados_desc: When unchecked, exports all orders in the current filter
exportacao.incluir_cabecalho_desc: Adds a header row with column names

numeracao.descricao: Sets the format and rules for automatically generated order numbers

kanban.modal_descricao: Configure the fields shown in each tab when opening an order in Kanban
kanban.card_descricao: Choose what appears on each Kanban card
kanban.modal_preview: Preview — how it will look in the modal
kanban.card_preview: Preview — how it will look on the card
kanban.campo_vazio_add: No active field — add one below
kanban.todos_adicionados: All available fields have been added
kanban.modal_hint: Drag to reorder · eye to hide · × to remove
kanban.card_ativos_hint: Eye to hide · Order No. is fixed and always shown
kanban.aba_fixa_hint: Fixed tab — native behavior, not configurable
kanban.data_critica_hint: Colored urgency bar (ok / warning / urgent) based on this date

tabela.descricao: Display preferences for the order list

cards.descricao: Cards displayed at the top · drag to reorder · eye to hide
cards.vazio: No card added. Choose from the list below.

casas_decimais.desc: Defines how many decimal places are shown in numeric columns. Default: 2
casas_decimais.grupo_pedido_hint: Items automatically inherit the decimal places of the parent order.
casas_decimais.hint_valor_total_pedido: Items: Total Item Value will have the same decimals
casas_decimais.hint_quantidade_total_inicial_pedido: Items: Initial, Transferred and Cancelled qty. will have the same decimals
casas_decimais.hint_peso_liquido_total_pedido: Items: Unit Net Weight will have the same decimals
casas_decimais.hint_peso_bruto_total_pedido: Items: Unit Gross Weight will have the same decimals
casas_decimais.hint_cubagem_total_pedido: Items: Unit Cubage will have the same decimals
casas_decimais.banner_post: existing items. Confirm to apply the migration in background.

formato_data.desc: Defines how dates are displayed in all table columns, edit inputs and exports.

personalizadas.desc: Add extra fields to the orders table. Created columns are available to all users.
personalizadas.hint_ativas: Drag to reorder · eye to hide · X to delete
personalizadas.empty_desc: Use the form below to create the first one
personalizadas.form_itens_diferentes_hint: Each order item can have its own value in this column.
personalizadas.form_alerta_migr: Values saved at order level are not automatically migrated to items. Each item will need to be filled in individually.
personalizadas.form_pedido_editavel_hint: Allows setting a default value at order level in addition to per-item values.
personalizadas.form_valor_padrao_hint: Automatically filled when creating a new order.
personalizadas.form_descricao_hint: Displayed as tooltip in the column header in the table.
personalizadas.form_opcoes_placeholder: Type and press Enter or click +
personalizadas.form_valor_add_opcoes_first: Add the list options above to define a default value.
personalizadas.tooltip_escopo_pedido: This column is order-only. To edit, click the order row.
personalizadas.formula_placeholder: Select fields below to build the formula
personalizadas.gabi_instrucoes: Click a field above to insert it. Use + − * / between numeric fields. For safe division: IF(denominator == 0, 0, numerator / denominator).
personalizadas.gabi_ok_preencher: All good! Fill in the remaining fields and click Create.

campos_calculados.desc: Fields whose value is generated by a formula. The formula can be adjusted per workspace.
campos_calculados.formula_placeholder: Select fields below to build the formula
campos_calculados.tooltip_colunas_custom: Numeric custom columns can also be included in the formula
campos_calculados.gabi_ok: All good! Click Save to apply.

templates_pdf.desc: Manage Handlebars templates used for PDF generation. Variables:
templates_pdf.label_variaveis: Available variables — click to insert at cursor
templates_pdf.empty: No templates created. Click "New Template" to get started.

duplicar.desc: Behavior when duplicating an existing order
duplicar.duplicar_itens_desc: Copies all items from the original order to the new one

duplicar_item.desc: Behavior when duplicating an existing item
duplicar_item.copiar_dados_desc: Copies all filled fields from the original item to the new one

excluir.desc: Permissions and behaviors when deleting orders
excluir.sem_itens_desc: If unchecked, deleting the last item automatically deletes the order
excluir.confirmar_preview: Request confirmation with preview before deleting

transferir.desc: Behavior when transferring quantities between orders
transferir.encerrar_origem: Close source item when quantity reaches zero
transferir.excluir_item_origem: Delete source item when quantity reaches zero
transferir.excluir_pedido_origem: Delete source order when all items reach zero
transferir.bloquear_acima_inicial: Do not allow transferring quantity greater than the initial quantity
transferir.bloquear_acima_inicial_desc: When active, blocks the transfer if the total transferred exceeds the initial order quantity. When inactive, the 'QTY. Transferred from Order' column is highlighted in red for orders that exceeded the limit.

consolidar.desc: Rules for merging multiple orders into one
consolidar.avisos_divergentes: Warn about divergent fields before consolidating
consolidar.fundir_part_number: Automatically merge items with same part_number
consolidar.fundir_part_number_desc: Sums quantities of items with the same product code
consolidar.usuario_escolhe: User chooses divergent values field by field
consolidar.usuario_escolhe_desc: Displays a selector for each field with different values between orders

alertas.desc: Visual warnings displayed directly in the orders table
alertas.numero_duplicado_desc: Displays a warning icon in the cell when two or more orders have the same number
alertas.valor_total_divergente_desc: Displays a warning icon when order_total_value differs from the sum of item values
alertas.qtd_total_divergente_desc: Displays a warning icon when the total order quantity differs from the sum of item quantities
alertas.qtd_pronta_divergente_desc: Displays a warning icon when the order ready quantity differs from the sum of item ready quantities
alertas.peso_liq_divergente: Net weight total divergent from items
alertas.peso_liq_divergente_desc: Displays a warning icon when net weight total differs from the sum of unit net weights × item quantities
alertas.peso_bruto_divergente: Gross weight total divergent from items
alertas.peso_bruto_divergente_desc: Displays a warning icon when gross weight total differs from the sum of unit gross weights × item quantities
alertas.cubagem_divergente_desc: Displays a warning icon when total cubage differs from the sum of unit cubages × item quantities

categ_anexos.desc: Organize documents attached to orders by category

taxa_cambio.desc: Official exchange rates from the Central Bank of Brazil · used for currency conversion in orders
taxa_cambio.empty_cotacao: No quotes stored. Click Sync PTAX.

drawer.erro_carregar: Error loading order. Please try again.
drawer.erro_transfer: Error loading transfers. Please try again.
drawer.confirm_msg: There is data that will be lost. Do you want to close anyway?
drawer.erro_salvar: Error saving order. Please try again.

banner.snapshot_atualizado_descricao: {{papeis}} data was updated on {{data}} based on changes in Records.

modal_novo.erro_data_invalida: Invalid issue date — use MM/DD/YYYY format or select from calendar.
modal_novo.erro_sem_conexao: No connection to server. Check your internet and try again.
modal_novo.erro_inesperado: Unexpected error. Check the console and try again.
modal_novo.erro_dados_invalidos: Invalid data. Check the required fields.
modal_novo.erro_http_400: Invalid request (400) — check your data and try again.
modal_novo.erro_http_401: Session expired (401) — reload the page and log in again.
modal_novo.erro_http_403: Permission denied (403) — you cannot create orders in this workspace.
modal_novo.erro_http_404: Route not found (404) — the server may be outdated. Try restarting it.
modal_novo.erro_http_409: Conflict (409) — an order with this number already exists.
modal_novo.erro_http_422: Invalid data (422) — check the Order Number and try again.
modal_novo.erro_http_500: Internal server error (500) — try again in a few moments.
modal_novo.erro_http_502: Gateway unavailable (502) — the server may be restarting.
modal_novo.erro_http_503: Service unavailable (503) — try again in a few moments.
modal_novo.tooltip_lado_da_org_importador: Your organization is the importer in this operation. This field is auto-filled and cannot be changed.
modal_novo.tooltip_lado_da_org_exportador: Your organization is the exporter in this operation. This field is auto-filled and cannot be changed.
modal_novo.erro_empresa_da_org: Could not load your organization's company. {{detalhe}}
modal_novo.falta_empresa_da_org: Your organization's company must be registered in Cadastros
modal_novo.falta_data_emissao_valida: Issue date must be a valid date
modal_novo.falta_documento_empresa: {{nome}} has no CNPJ/Tax ID in Cadastros — required for the order
modal_novo.empresa_br_sem_cnpj: {{nome}} is a Brazilian company with no CNPJ — Brazilian companies need a CNPJ in Cadastros before they can be used in an order.
modal_novo.contraparte_pais_br: {{nome}} is a Brazilian company — in international orders the {{papel}} must be foreign. Pick another company or change the country in Cadastros.

cadastro_empresa.papel_atribuido: This company will be registered as {{papel}}. You can edit the remaining data later in Cadastros.
cadastro_empresa.papel_nao_marcado: This company is not flagged with this role in Cadastros yet
cadastro_empresa.cnpj_obrigatorio_motivo: Required to generate the order's legal and fiscal documents.
cadastro_empresa.tin_obrigatorio_motivo: Foreign tax identifier — required for the order snapshot.
cadastro_empresa.tin_opcional_motivo: Can be filled later in Cadastros — the order is only created when present.
cadastro_empresa.cnpj_opcional: Can be filled in later in Cadastros
cadastro_empresa.sucesso_toast: Company "{{nome}}" registered successfully. Complete remaining data in Cadastros when you can.
cadastro_empresa.erro_401: Session expired — reload the page and try again.
cadastro_empresa.erro_403: No permission to register companies in this workspace.
cadastro_empresa.erro_409: A company with this name, CNPJ or TIN already exists.
cadastro_empresa.erro_422: Invalid data — check name, country and CNPJ.
cadastro_empresa.erro_cnpj: Invalid CNPJ. Use the format XX.XXX.XXX/XXXX-XX (or leave it empty).

modal_dup.aviso_zerados_titulo: Heads-up — fields that will be reset on duplicated items
modal_dup.aviso_zerados_campos: Ready, Transferred and Cancelled quantities will be reset to zero on the duplicated item.
modal_dup.aviso_zerados_motivo: These values represent real execution (transfers to shipping, ready markings, cancellations) and cannot be copied — prevents phantom balance.

raio_x.reset_pedido_campos: Order ID, Creation date, Update date, Source orders (consolidation), Consolidation date, Balance transfer date
raio_x.reset_item_campos: Item ID, Creation date, Update date, Current balance, Ready qty, Transferred qty, Cancelled qty
raio_x.reset_motivo: System-generated fields — no reason to copy.
raio_x.copiado_desc: HS code, exporter, importer, origin/destination country, currency, incoterm, transport mode, units of measure, initial quantity and other structural order data.

modal_cons.conflito_msg: Cannot consolidate import orders with export orders. Select only orders of the same operation type.
modal_cons.numero_hint: Auto-generated suggestion — you can edit it
modal_cons.fundir_hint: Sums quantities of items with the same part_number across orders

modal_transf.cenario_reducao_desc: Cancels the difference — quantity reduced with no destination.
modal_transf.cenario_split_novo_desc: Difference becomes a new order with a defined number.
modal_transf.cenario_split_exist_desc: Difference goes to an order that already exists.
modal_transf.erro_carregar_pedidos: Failed to load eligible orders. Please try again.
modal_transf.alerta_reducao: The quantity will be canceled with no destination. This operation is not reversible.
modal_transf.aviso_tipos_msg: The destination order is of a different type (import ↔ export). Confirm you want to proceed anyway.
modal_transf.confirm_tipos_divergentes: I confirm I want to transfer between orders of different types
modal_transf.passo5_reversivel: Review the summary above before confirming. This action can be reversed later.
modal_transf.passo5_irreversivel: Review the summary above before confirming. This action cannot be reversed.
modal_transf.subtitulo: Move items between orders in the same organization

modal_massa.preview_vazio: Fill in the fields above to see the impact
modal_massa.mixed_tipos_msg: Fields exclusive to import or export will not be shown.
modal_massa.aviso_lento: Slow operation: {{count}} orders with fields that need to be processed individually. Estimated time: ~{{segundos}} seconds. Do not close the window during processing.
modal_massa.erro_campo_obrigatorio: Fill in at least one field to continue

modal_pdf.sem_templates: No templates created. Go to Settings → PDF Templates.

modal_col.formula_dica: Supports + - * / and functions IF(cond, yes, no) and SUM_ITEMS(field).
modal_col.placeholder_opcao: Type and press Enter or click +
modal_col.erro_sem_opcoes: Add at least one option to the list.
modal_col.erro_circular: Circular reference detected: the formula creates a dependency cycle. Remove the reference that points back to this column.

smart_import.aviso_confianca: ⚠ Medium confidence: {{pct}}% — review mapping before continuing
smart_import.aviso_limite: ⚠ File with {{total}} rows — consider splitting into smaller batches of 1,000 rows for better performance
smart_import.pdf_aguarde: PDFs with many pages can take up to 60–90 seconds — please wait
smart_import.xlsx_aguarde: This may take a few seconds for large files
smart_import.rascunho_hint: Orders will be created with Draft status — review and change to Open after importing
smart_import.err_rede: Could not connect to server. Check if the service is running.
smart_import.err_servidor_upload: Internal server error processing the file. Try again.
smart_import.err_servidor_confirmar: Internal server error importing orders. Try again.
smart_import.err_arquivo_grande: File too large for the server. The limit is 10MB.
smart_import.err_sessao: Session expired. Close the modal and try again.
smart_import.err_timeout: Timeout exceeded. The file may be too large — try splitting into smaller batches.
smart_import.err_dados: Invalid data. Check the mapping and try again.
smart_import.dica_formato: Supported formats: {{extensoes}} (do not use spreadsheets saved as “web page” .html)
smart_import.dica_template: Use the template spreadsheet as a starting point (button above)
smart_import.dica_pdf_texto: PDFs must have selectable text — scanned (image) PDFs are not accepted
smart_import.prog_pdf_2: Extracting items from document (may take up to 60s)...
smart_import.prog_pdf_3: Identifying fields: order number, exporter, items...
smart_import.prog_pdf_5: Checking for duplicates in the system...
smart_import.prog_xlsx_3: Checking for duplicates in the system...

email.responder_desc: Opens the reply editor for this email
email.encaminhar_desc: Forwards this email to another recipient
email.vincular_desc: Associates this email with a follow-up task

workflow.sem_processo_desc: Select a process to view the workflow
workflow.comentario_desc: Add notes visible to the team
workflow.excluir_doc_desc: Remove this document from the process
workflow.excluir_doc_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.

dados_tecnicos.subtitulo: Technical information about transport, clearance and insurance of the process
dados_tecnicos.importador_desc: Data of the Brazilian importer responsible for the operation
dados_tecnicos.exportador_desc: Data of the international supplier shipping the goods
dados_tecnicos.transporte_desc: Transport route and shipment logistics settings
dados_tecnicos.despacho_desc: Tax and customs parameters required for clearance

hero.titulo: One platform for all your services
hero.subtitulo: Gravity is a modular multi-tenant B2B SaaS platform for logistics and foreign trade

features.dashboard_desc: Real-time metrics for all your operations
features.whatsapp_desc: Native integration with Meta Cloud API
features.cronometro_desc: Track time by project and task

social_proof.confiado: Trusted by companies that grow with intelligence

servicos.subtitulo: Each module exists once per company

demo.subtitulo: Explore the full environment with real data

pricing.subtitulo: Start for free. Scale when you need to.
pricing.demo_upgrade: Demo: See how the Pro upgrade works

cta.subtitulo: 14 free days. Setup in 60 seconds. Cancel anytime.

exit_intent.descricao: We noticed you explored Gravity. Want to receive a link to continue where you left off?

store.smart_read_desc: Intelligent data extraction from documents and images using AI. Automatically processes invoices and customs documents.
store.nf_pro_desc: Advanced version of NF Import with support for special regimes, drawback, and SISCOMEX customs system integration.
store.prod_bid_frete_desc: Smart international freight quoting and bidding with multiple suppliers in real time.
store.prod_bid_cambio_desc: Exchange rate consultation and comparison with Central Bank data across multiple currencies.
store.prod_nf_importacao_desc: Automated import invoice processing with SEFAZ validation and NCM tax calculation.
store.prod_lpco_desc: Management of Licenses, Permits, Certificates and Others (LPCO) integrated with SISCOMEX and automatic balance tracking.
store.prod_pedido_desc: Complete purchase order management with approval workflow, tracking and ERP system integration.
store.prod_simula_custo_desc: Detailed import cost simulation with automatic tax calculation by NCM code and scenario comparison.
store.prod_smart_read_desc: Intelligent data extraction from documents and images using AI. Automatically processes invoices and customs documents.

ncm.subtitulo: Portal Único Siscomex — Brazil's NCM table synchronized daily
ncm.alerta_texto: The NCM table is outdated — last sync was on {{data}}. Click Sync Now to update.

ncm_modal.subtitulo: Configure the automatic synchronization job for the NCM table from Portal Único Siscomex
ncm_modal.config_info: The job automatically synchronizes the NCM table from Portal Único Siscomex for all active organizations. The Siscomex table is updated at midnight.
ncm_modal.vazio_notif: No recipients configured. Click '+ New Recipient' to add one.
ncm_modal.exec_info: Runs the NCM synchronization immediately for all organizations with registered data, using the same logic as the automatic job.
ncm_modal.historico_hint: Detailed execution history available on the main NCM Synchronization page.
ncm_modal.notif_exec_falha: Failed to execute NCM manual sync.

certificados.senha_nota: The password is only used for validation and will be stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM)
